lowTemperature.name: Low Foot Temperature ({{foot}} Foot)
lowTemperature.description: Your {{foot}} foot has been showing consistently low temperature readings over the past few days ({{temp}}{{tempSymbol}}). This may indicate poor circulation or cold exposure.

highTemperature.name: High Foot Temperature ({{foot}} Foot)
highTemperature.description: Your {{foot}} foot has been showing consistently high temperature readings over the past few days ({{temp}}{{tempSymbol}}). This may indicate inflammation or overheating.

wideFootAngle.name: Wide Foot Angle
wideFootAngle.description: Your left and right feet have shown a significant alignment difference ({{avgDifference}}°) over the past few days. This may indicate a wide foot angle and/or out-toeing.

highArches.name: High Arches ({{foot}} Foot)
highArches.description: Your {{foot}} foot shows consistently low pressure in the arch area ({{pressure}}%), indicating high arches. This may require appropriate footwear support.

lowArches.name: Low Arches / Flat Feet ({{foot}} Foot)
lowArches.description: Your {{foot}} foot shows consistently high pressure in the arch area ({{pressure}}%), indicating low arches or flat feet. Consider arch support in your footwear.

highOverallPressure.name: High Foot Pressure ({{foot}} Foot)
highOverallPressure.description: Your {{foot}} foot shows consistently high pressure across all sensors ({{pressure}}%). This may indicate heavy foot strike or excessive weight bearing. Consider footwear with better cushioning.

lowOverallPressure.name: Low Foot Pressure ({{foot}} Foot)
lowOverallPressure.description: Your {{foot}} foot shows consistently low pressure across sensors ({{pressure}}%). This may indicate reduced activity, light foot strike, or the insole not being worn regularly.

heelHeavyGait.name: Heel-Heavy Gait ({{foot}} Foot)
heelHeavyGait.description: Your {{foot}} foot shows consistently high pressure on the heel ({{pressure}}%). This heel-strike pattern may lead to heel discomfort. Consider adjusting your gait or using heel cushioning.

toeHeavyGait.name: Toe-Heavy Gait ({{foot}} Foot)
toeHeavyGait.description: Your {{foot}} foot shows consistently high pressure on the toes ({{pressure}}%). This forefoot-strike pattern may cause toe or ball of foot discomfort over time.

highBallPressure.name: High Ball of Foot Pressure ({{foot}} Foot)
highBallPressure.description: Your {{foot}} foot shows consistently high pressure on the ball of the foot ({{pressure}}%). This can lead to metatarsalgia or discomfort in the forefoot area.

temperatureAsymmetry.name: Temperature Asymmetry
temperatureAsymmetry.description: Your feet show a significant temperature difference ({{avgDifference}}{{tempSymbol}}). This asymmetry may indicate circulation differences or uneven thermal exposure between your feet.

weightDistributionImbalance.name: Weight Distribution Imbalance
weightDistributionImbalance.description: Your weight distribution between feet shows a consistent imbalance ({{percentage}}% difference). This may indicate favoring one leg, which could lead to posture or gait issues.
